nodes.label: Migration produits via table temporaire (image → image_url, sans stock_actuel).
nodes.norm_label: migration produits via table temporaire (image → image_url, sans stock_actuel).

nodes.label: Server-Sent Events real-time architecture
nodes.rationale: Replaced 30s polling with SSE to avoid Railway's 30s connection timeout; heartbeat every 25s keeps connections alive

nodes.label: createVenteWithStock (atomic transaction)
nodes.rationale: Atomic MySQL transaction to ensure stock integrity: check stock, insert facture, decrement boutique_stock, sync produits.stock_boutique, insert livraison, sync boutique_clients

nodes.label: MySQL direct via mysql2/promise (no Prisma)
nodes.rationale: Explicit architectural choice to avoid Prisma and use mysql2/promise directly for all DB operations

nodes.label: ROUTE_TO_MODULE sidebar routing (startsWith order)
nodes.rationale: Specific routes must appear before general routes in ROUTE_TO_MODULE: /admin/stock-boutique before /admin/stock to avoid wrong module activation

nodes.label: Auto-init DB tables (no manual migration)
nodes.rationale: ensureBoutiqueStockPopulated(), ensureBoutiqueClientsTable(), ensureMarquesTable() auto-create and populate tables — no manual SQL scripts needed
